positive: A vibrant, stylized forest creature portrait, featuring a majestic fox with glowing neon blue accents on its fur and tips of its tail. The fox is seated in a stylized, symmetrical pose among bioluminescent mushrooms and crystalline leaves. Dynamic composition, strong negative space, vector art style mixed with detailed digital painting, clean silhouette, ultra-high contrast, cinematic volumetric lighting, deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) against a deep forest black background. Perfect for a central apparel print, clean edges, highly detailed fur texture, perfect symmetry.
negative: blurry, poorly rendered, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, cartoon, sketch, realistic photo, cropped, ugly, disfigured
